queries: Dinitz Garg Goemans conjecture unsplittable flow cost counterexample
finding: The exact supplied seven-vertex witness and packet identifiers were not found in the searched public sources. The general cost conjecture is described as open in arXiv:2308.02651; series-parallel special cases are known. Social posts report the same claim but are not primary validation.
limitations: The search is a dated public-source receipt; private or unindexed material may exist.
